pi_items.source: Azure DevOps REST API 7.1 documentation (Microsoft Learn) specifies DayOfWeek enum supports: sunday, monday, tuesday, wednesday, thursday, friday, saturday. Task metadata correctly specifies a Sunday-Thursday work schedule as claimed in task description.

Azure DevOps REST API 7.1 documentation (Microsoft Learn) specifies BugsBehavior enum with values: off, asRequirements, asTasks. The metadata correctly specifies 'asRequirements' which corresponds to 'Bugs are managed with requirements' setting in Azure DevOps UI.

Azure DevOps REST API 7.1 documentation (Microsoft Learn) sample responses show iteration paths formatted as '\\IterationName' or '\\ProjectName\\IterationName'. Task description and setup_azure_devops.ps1 (line 188) create 'Sprint 1' iteration in the TailwindTraders project, matching the expected path format.

Task description (line 5 of task.json) explicitly states 'You must apply these settings for the TailwindTraders Team'. This is the default team created for the TailwindTraders project by setup_azure_devops.ps1.

Azure DevOps REST API 7.1 documentation (Microsoft Learn) sample response shows backlogVisibilities object with keys: 'Microsoft.EpicCategory', 'Microsoft.FeatureCategory', 'Microsoft.RequirementCategory'. Verifier.py (line 106) checks for 'Microsoft.EpicCategory' key matching the official API documentation.

privileged_info_summary: The configure_team_sprint_settings task requires updating Azure DevOps team settings for the TailwindTraders Team in the TailwindTraders project. Working days must be set to Sunday through Thursday (not the default Monday-Friday). Bugs behavior must be set to 'asRequirements' (Bugs are managed with requirements). Backlog visibility for epics must be enabled by setting Microsoft.EpicCategory to true. The default iteration must be set to TailwindTraders\Sprint 1. These settings are configured via the Azure DevOps REST API 7.1 team settings endpoints. All metadata values have been verified against the official Microsoft Azure DevOps REST API documentation.
